pyepo.func.jax.utils
====================

.. py:module:: pyepo.func.jax.utils

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Utility functions for the JAX frontend



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.func.jax.utils.batch_solve
   pyepo.func.jax.utils.solve_or_cache
   pyepo.func.jax.utils.grow_solpool


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: batch_solve(cost, optmodel, processes=1, pool=None)

   A function to solve a batch of costs for the JAX frontend


.. py:function:: solve_or_cache(cost, module)

   A function to solve a batch or reuse the solution pool


.. py:function:: grow_solpool(module, pred_cost)

   A function to re-solve the predicted cost and grow the module's solution pool
